plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Fixed radio triggering on every track (playingSongIndex fix). Fixed radio-on-radio infinite chain. Fixed album artist showing "Album". Fixed SCALAR album name bug. Added nodejs JS runtime for faster yt-dlp resolution. Windows-safe prefetch cleanup. Album title injected into tracks.
plugin.creator: schmij97
